note_module_probe.sql:
SELECT table_name
    FROM `physionet-data.mimiciv_note.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES`
    ORDER BY table_name

stroke_basic.sql:
WITH stroke_dx AS (
  SELECT
    i.subject_id,
    i.hadm_id,
    i.stay_id,
    i.intime,
    i.outtime,
    i.los,
    MAX(CASE WHEN d.seq_num = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS primary_dx_flag
  FROM `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_hosp.diagnoses_icd` d
  JOIN `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_icu.icustays` i
    ON d.hadm_id = i.hadm_id
  WHERE
    (d.icd_version = 10 AND d.icd_code LIKE 'I63%')
    OR
    (d.icd_version = 9 AND (d.icd_code LIKE '433%' OR d.icd_code LIKE '434%' OR d.icd_code = '436'))
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
)
SELECT
  s.subject_id,
  s.hadm_id,
  s.stay_id,
  s.intime,
  s.outtime,
  s.los,
  s.primary_dx_flag,
  a.hospital_expire_flag,
  p.gender,
  CAST(p.anchor_age + EXTRACT(YEAR FROM a.admittime) - p.anchor_year AS INT64) AS age
FROM stroke_dx s
JOIN `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_hosp.admissions` a
  ON s.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
JOIN `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_hosp.patients` p
  ON s.subject_id = p.subject_id

sepsis_basic.sql:
SELECT
  i.subject_id,
  i.hadm_id,
  i.stay_id,
  MIN(CAST(DATETIME_DIFF(DATETIME(s.sofa_time), DATETIME(i.intime), HOUR) AS INT64)) AS sepsis_onset_hour
FROM `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_derived.sepsis3` s
JOIN `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_icu.icustays` i
  USING (stay_id)
WHERE s.sepsis3 = TRUE
  AND s.sofa_time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1,2,3

WITH cohort AS (
WITH stroke_dx AS (

    i.los,

    ON d.hadm_id = i.hadm_id

    OR
    (d.icd_version = 9 AND (d.icd_code LIKE '433%' OR d.icd_code LIKE '434%' OR d.icd_code = '436'))
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
)
SELECT
  s.subject_id,
  s.hadm_id,
  s.stay_id,
  s.intime,
  s.outtime,
  s.los,
  s.primary_dx_flag,
  a.hospital_expire_flag,
  p.gender,
  CAST(p.anchor_age + EXTRACT(YEAR FROM a.admittime) - p.anchor_year AS INT64) AS age
FROM stroke_dx s
JOIN `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_hosp.admissions` a
  ON s.hadm_id = a.hadm_id
JOIN `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_hosp.patients` p
  ON s.subject_id = p.subject_id
),
        obs AS (
          SELECT c.stay_id, COUNT(*) AS n_meas
          FROM cohort c
          JOIN `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_icu.icustays` i USING (stay_id)
          JOIN `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_icu.chartevents` ce ON ce.stay_id = c.stay_id
          WHERE ce.itemid IN (220045)
            AND DATETIME_DIFF(DATETIME(ce.charttime), DATETIME(i.intime), HOUR) BETWEEN 0 AND 72
          GROUP BY c.stay_id
        )
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_stays_with_measurement,
               APPROX_QUANTILES(n_meas, 100)[OFFSET(50)] AS median_measurements
        FROM obs
